story.text:
# ✨ Prove Zero Knowledge
**🌙 → ✅ → ❌ → 🤝**
*selene_cosmological · cosmological · (cosmological)*

Satisfy the three ZK properties (completeness · soundness · zero-knowledge) by orbital mechanics rather than cryptographic protocol. The cosmological instance the architecture inherits.

> Zero knowledge is older than cryptography. The architecture inherits the recognition; it does not invent the property.

*Keywords:* zero-knowledge · completeness · soundness · cosmological · v6-c17-precedent
